sglang.title: [Fix] Slice input_embeds to extend_input_len in prepare_for_extend
sglang.author: kitft
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
When PrefillAdder truncates a request on chunk overflow (rem_chunk_tokens exceeded), it adjusts fill_ids and extend_input_len but not req.input_embeds. prepare_for_extend then appends the full-length embedding array while out_cache_loc is sized for the truncated extend_input_len, causing:

sglang.title: feat: Add 'none' reasoning effort to ChatCompletionRequest
sglang.author: Javtor
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
The OpenAI Python SDK's ReasoningEffort type includes "none" (source), and vLLM recently added support for it (vllm#36238). SGLang currently only accepts "low", "medium", "high".
This is useful for models like Qwen3.5 that have built-in reasoning, so callers can disable thinking per-reque

sglang.title: [RadixTree][8/N Refactor]: unify lock interface
sglang.author: pansicheng
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

The current lock reference interface is inconsistent across cache implementations:

inc_lock_ref returns different types depending on the implementation.
dec_lock_ref uses inconsistent parameter types and calling conventions.
dec_lock_ref also returns different types across implementatio

sglang.title: [test] Fix bfloat16 tolerance in test_selective_state_update
sglang.author: roopaksrivastav
sglang.bodyExcerpt: The test_selective_state_update fails sporadically with bfloat16 on different random seeds due to insufficient tolerance for mixed-precision operations. The current tolerance (rtol=1e-2, atol=5e-2) doesn't account for bfloat16 rounding error accumulation through the computation pipeline: state→einsu

sglang.author: ShangmingCai
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
A following PR to #20371.
As mentioned before, pending reqs resolving will be stuck when one prefill server is down because _fetch_prefill_server_info is a blocking version running in the main thread.

make _resolve_pending_reqs asynchronously, so the main scheduling thread won't be stuck

sglang.title: [HiCache] fix: release write-through lock_ref during decode
sglang.author: alphabetc1
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Root cause: check_hicache_events() was only called in the prefill path (_get_new_batch_prefill_raw). During pure decode loops, write_through operations locked radix-tree nodes via inc_lock_ref(), but the acks (which call dec_lock_ref()) were never processed. This caused all evictable toke

vllm.author: leo-cf-tian

Purpose
This PR is a port of PR #32217 to the vLLM top-of-tree after the modular kernel refactors in #32564. It adds the latest TRT-LLM gen A2A kernel from flashinfer's MoE-A2A API (one sided all-to-all) as added in (flashinfer-ai/flashinfer#2102). This should perform better than the older A2A kerne
